revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{cite web |url={{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=https://www.learnersdictionary.com/definition/|medical=https://www.merriam-webster.com/medical/|https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/}}{{urlencode:{{{1}}}|PATH}} |title={{{1}}}|work=[[Merriam-Webster|Merriam-Webster.com {{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=Learner's{{sp}}|medical=Medical{{sp}}}}Dictionary]] |publisher=Merriam-Webster |access-date={{{access-date|}}} |author= {{#switch:{{{3|}}}|include_author=Merriam-Webster}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{cite web |url={{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=https://www.learnersdictionary.com/definition/|medical=https://www.merriam-webster.com/medical/|https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/}}{{urlencode:{{{1}}}|PATH}} |title={{{1}}}|work=[[Merriam-Webster|Merriam-Webster.com {{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=Learner's{{sp}}|medical=Medical{{sp}}}}Dictionary]] |publisher=Merriam-Webster |access-date={{{access-date|}}} |author= {{#switch:{{{3|}}}|include_author=Merriam-Webster}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Merriam-Webster here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Merriam-Webster for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{cite web |url={{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=https://www.learnersdictionary.com/definition/|medical=https://www.merriam-webster.com/medical/|https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/}}{{urlencode:{{{1}}}|PATH}} |title={{{1}}}|work=[[Merriam-Webster|Merriam-Webster.com {{#switch:{{{2|}}}|learners=Learner's{{sp}}|medical=Medical{{sp}}}}Dictionary]] |publisher=Merriam-Webster |access-date={{{access-date|}}} |author= {{#switch:{{{3|}}}|include_author=Merriam-Webster}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
